name: haakco-test-contract
description: Shared JSON schema contract for HaakCo test runner sections

scripts.validate:schema: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; JSON.parse(readFileSync(new URL('./schemas/sections.schema.json', import.meta.url), 'utf8')); console.log('sections.schema.json parse OK');"
